description:
2024 Lamborghini Urus S, 4.0L TC V8, 4WD, 657 bhp, 8 Speed Automatic. AED 1,129,000 or AED 17,688 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 28,404 KM's - Lamborghini Warranty Valid Until 6th April 2029 - Lamborghini Service Contract Valid Until 6th April 2027 - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Hight Gloss Black Exterior Accents - Carbon Fiber Kick Plates - Bang & Olufsen 3D Surround Audio - Keyless Entry - Keyless Start - Heads Up Display - Adaptive Cruise Control - Heated & Ventilated Seats - Massage Seats - Apple CarPlay - Soft Close Doors - Electronically Adjustable Seats incl. Memory Function - Selectable Drive Modes - Panoramic Sunroof - Alcantara Roof Lining - Multi-Functional Steering Wheel
